final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic movie poster reimagining of 大话西游 (A Chinese Odyssey) in 1990s Hong Kong film style.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography aesthetic, 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster art in the spirit of Wong Kar-wai and Jeffrey Lau — heavy film grain, faded warm emulsion, hand-painted poster sensibility with photographic base
Composition: wide vertical poster framing, foreground dominated by the embracing couple against a crumbling ancient city wall, two distant figures standing apart in the far background, shallow depth of field pulling focus to the kiss
Subject: 至尊宝 and 紫霞 locked in a passionate kiss pressed against a weathered stone city wall — 至尊宝 in tattered monk-warrior robes, 紫霞 in flowing purple fairy dress; in the blurred distance, 牛魔王 (Bull Demon King) in dark armored silhouette and 唐僧 (Tang Monk) in white kasaya robes stand apart, watching
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese fortress city wall at dusk, crumbling stone battlements, vast desolate sky with streaked clouds
Lighting/mood: golden-hour backlight casting long warm shadows, melancholic and bittersweet — the ache of doomed love, quintessential 1990s Hong Kong romantic tragedy tone
Color palette: desaturated warm amber and dusty rose as base, faded cyan shadows, muted purple accent from 紫霞's dress, overall palette aged and slightly bleached as if from a worn VHS print
Materials/textures: heavy visible film grain throughout, halation around light sources, slight color bleed at edges, scratched emulsion texture on highlights
Avoid: digital-clean rendering, oversaturated colors, modern CGI poster look, lens flare stuffer, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
